headerDisplay: Exposes Shelly devices to Apple Home over Matter, including live power and energy metering (iOS 27+). Requires Homebridge v2.2.0+ with Matter enabled on the bridge.

mdnsDiscover.title: Discover devices via mDNS
mdnsDiscover.description: Automatically discover Shelly devices on the local network.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Per-device configuration. Discovered devices appear in the table above; add a device manually only when mDNS cannot find it (set its IP address). By default plugs are shown as outlets and other devices as lights, with power metering enabled where available.

host.title: IP address or hostname (filled automatically for discovered devices; lets the plugin work without mDNS)

name.title: Name shown in the Home app

channels.title: Channels (multi-channel devices only)
channels.description: Per-channel settings; channels without an entry use the device settings. Channel numbers are 0-based, as on the device.

condition.functionBody: try { const c = model.devices[arrayIndices[0]].channels; return Array.isArray(c) && c.length > 1; } catch (e) { return false; }

username.title: Username
username.description: Username for password-protected Gen 1 devices. Gen 2+ devices always use 'admin'.

interfaceName.title: Network interface
interfaceName.description: Optional network interface to use for mDNS discovery (e.g. eth0).
